TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Ten-ci_-sin, title = Ten-ci_-sin, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ten-ci_-sin} }

S.FORM: == Ten-ci -sin Ś§©ťöõÁ∑ö == Ten-ci -sin " kaku nu maci, kahaminan maadih ku hekahekalan atu tapukuan a sulit" u namaka tukay a talakaway a matatuntunduhay a luma' atu tapukuan. hakiya nu hida sananay a aadihan nu masangaay, picidekan, namakayda i yadahay nu muo-tin matatunduhay a lumaan a masangaay nu aadihan. Ten-ci -sin malatukayay nu masangaay nu luma'an a tademaw nu kakenihan, u sakay tukayan nu micidekay a aadihan. itini i macimacian, ina Ten-ci-sin mala ahebalay nu aadihan " u mahaminay adihan ku hekahekalan", sisa itini i tukay pangangan han u " tukay sakainalan nu aadihan". hatiniay tu nu tukayan, ina muo-ten matatunduhay a luma' itini i tapukuan a kenisan idaw ku angangangan nu nida. Ś§©ťöõÁ∑ö . "Ten-ci -sin" ina sasakamuen sayaway a nika tahekala i cacay a malebut walu a lasubu siwa a bataan idaw ku enem (1896) mihcaan, tayan i Niu-ye pasingbungay idaw ku bangcalay nu kulitan a sapasingdng a sulitan. misangaay tu luma' ci Paw-luo.D. Se-pu-ken "Paul D. Spreireg" sakamusa tu Ten-ci-sin i tukay saan " saka udip nu i tukayay a u-li kasasiduma, u nalimaan kuyda sa, sakalecad nu aadihan nu heni sa". "Ś§©ťöõÁ∑ö" D¬∑śĖĮśôģťáĆś†Ļ(Paul D. Spreiregen) ". ayda yadah tu ku i kitakiday nu matinengay tu Ten-ci-sin a masakaputay atu wan-cen, u sakay tukay a muo-ten matatunduhay a luma' a talakaw ku sakasiwantanan. idaw ku sananay sipakayda i bangcal atu talakaw nu luma'an atu kaku a Ten-ci-sin nu ahebal ku sakasiwantan. sasaausian nina Ten-ci-sin mahida u nipiwada tu saadidiay a 90 mi atu 295 ce sa, masangaay nu luma'an a pulung nu talakaw atu " u mi ku sausian, caay piala tu madicemay". anu masacacayay nu ta u pankiw ku sausi tu talakaw nu heni sa. . kasasidumaÁČĻŚĺĶ muo-ten matatungduhay a lumaan hinisa u tukay nu madayumay a kasasiduma. saan u sangan nu kaku atu hekal nu cabeng " cengan atu galasu" mamin ku hekal nu Ten-ci-sin a malalid, nu caayay ka lecad nu zitay a nisangaan tu matatunduhay a luma'an, masa micidekay tu a Ten-ci-sin. nika hidaan, itida i inainakaan idaw ku sakaadih a Ten-ci-sin, amica ku hida sananay namaka adidiay nu tademawan atu yadahay nu tademawan a nisangaan. sumamadŚŹ§šĽ£ itida i Yi-ta-li Tuo-se-ka-na a Sen-ci-mi-ni-ya-nuo idaw ku picidekan a matatungduhay a luma'an saan ku kamu idaw ku " saka caay ka pawan a Ten-ci-sin". itida i sabaw sepat a seci maaalaw tu sakay kilian, manglay a sikili atu sakasiidaan a binacadan sapaseneng a kilian, malingatu tu i tukay misangan tu talakaway nu taan, sisa ina Sen-ci-mi-ni-ya-nuo mila sapanganganaw tu " cung-se-ci a Man-ha-tun" a Ten-ci-sin. . sumamad a Ye-men sumamaday a tukayan Si-pa-mu, idaw ku malakuuytay nu tusa a malebut (2000) a luitan. mangalay midiput tu tukay atu binacadan a caay ka sawacu nu Pei-in tademaw, ci Si-pa-mu itida i enem a seci patideng tu lima katuku tu siwa a matatungduhay nu luma'an. aminca ayda nina Si-pa-mu u tademaw nu heni pitu a malebut a kitidaan nu tukayan (7000), nika nika talakawan nina lumaan a idaw, ina tukay singangan tu " u sumamaday a matatungduhay a lumaan" atu likelikenan a Man-ha-tun. Sen ayda ina Ci-mi-ni-ya-nuo a iluitan nu niyadu'an atu Si-pa-mu a malumanay a cabeng mala Lin-he-kuo-cia-ke-wen masakaputay a kitikid lalangawan namaka babalakiay a nganganan. . aydaay a zitay ÁŹĺšĽ£ Ce-cia-ke saan u aydaay nu tukay a Ten-ci-sin a tapang nu kitidaan. cacay a malebut walu a lasubu walu a bataan idaw ku lima a mihcaan (1885), Ce-cia-ke misangan tu cacay a bataan nu matatungduhay a luma' nu luma' hukin a matatungduhay nu luma'an. inasangan u sayaway u mukinanay a sangaan. sisa nikudanay nu misangaay hida satu mitudung. cacay a malebut walu a lasubu walu a bataan idaw ku siwa a mihcan, ina huytan matatungduhay a luma mala kitakiday u satalakaway nu sanga a luma'an. cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu pitu a bataan idaw ku tulu (1973) mihcaan, ina Ce-cia-ke a Ten-ci-sin milab utu Si-e-se matatungduhay a luma'an " aydaay a Wi-li-se matatungduhay a luma'", nika namakayda i cacay a malebut walu a lasubu siwa a bataan (1890) mihcaan malingatu , u Niw-ye ku mialaay tu Ce-cia-ke a nikatalakawan tu sangaan. mala kitakid nu sayadahay nu muo-ten matatungduhay a tukayan. . katukuh i 1997 mihcaan masangan ku tusaay a taan, ina Si-e-se matatungduhay a luma'an itini i kitakid u satalakaway tu, itini tu i 20 seci nu ayawan, Ce-cia-ke atu Niw-ye u aydaay nu tukay nu Ten-ci-sin malahatay a milingatuay. ÁõīŚąį1997 . kilulsa tu 20 seci nu hedek u Ya-cuo kanatal nu nikaudip a nikalahatan. Ya-cuo angangangan nu tukay malingatu idaw ku masangaay nu matatungduhay a sangaan. saan tu San-hay-se a Pu-tun-sin-ci itida i cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu walu a bataan (1980 ) mihcaan naw u talutaludan, nika itida i cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu siwa a bataan idaw ku tusa (1992 ) mihcaan malingatu misatadas, amelik satu a mabuwah, mala aydaay a pisiwbayan, mala aydaay a Ten-ci-sin. ťö®ŤĎó20 . cumud satu 21 seci, u Cung-tun a sisimalay nu kanatal ku sakay nikudan a kanatal hida satu matulin idaw ku tabakiay a tukay nu Ten-ci-sin a kiyakuan. Tu-pay a Ha-li-fa-ta itida i tusa a malebut cacay a bataan (2010 ) mihcaan malingatu misangan, mikiayaw tu naayaway a sangan nu muo-ten matatungduhay a luma'an, sa ina Tu-pay mala matulinay nu sangan a talakaw nu tukayan. ťÄ≤ŚÖ•21šłĖÁīÄ, . katukuh tu tusa a malebut cacay a bataan idaw ku tulu (2013) mihcaan, Sin-kan itida i 150 kun-ce a sangaan milakuuyt tu 20 a seci nu dayhiwan a muo-tin-luo nu Ten-ci-sin a Niw-ye, u Tu-pay itida i 200 mi a sangaan nu lima'an milakuuyt tu Niw-ye, mala kitakiday u dayhiw a Ten-ci-sin nu tukayan. hatidaay a wancen saan tu udip a nika situngusay nu Ten-ci-sin tu nganganan. pasu Emporis a cudadan tu nicukaymasan atu duma nu sulitan u sangan a nipatahekalan, pulung han mala Ten-ci-sin. sakasinganganan nu satalakaway han tulu a tukayan u Sin-kan, Suo-e atu Se-cen. Emporis . sapicukaymas ťĀčÁĒ® mahiniay a Ten-ci-sin u dadayiwan nu tukay a tataydaan midang nu waywayan, pasu iga, kamuk nu tilibi, pasingbungan atu duma nu metian a kulul atu tataydaan misasing tu papatahekalan. .
S.PHON: == t…ôn- ¶i -sin *** == t…ôn- ¶i -sin " kaku nu ma ¶i, kańßaminan maadińß ku ńß…ôkańß…ôkar~…ĺan atu tapukuan a sur~…ĺit" u namaka tukaj a tar~…ĺakawaj a matatuntunduńßaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° atu tapukuan. ńßakija nu ńßida sananaj a aadińßan nu masaŇčaaj, pi ¶id…ôkan, namakajda i jadańßaj nu muo-tin matatunduńßaj a r~…ĺumaan a masaŇčaaj nu aadińßan. t…ôn- ¶i -sin mar~…ĺatukajaj nu masaŇčaaj nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an a tad…ômaw nu kak…ônińßan, u sakaj tukajan nu mi ¶id…ôkaj a aadińßan. itini i ma ¶ima ¶ian, ina t…ôn- ¶i-sin mar~…ĺa ańß…ôbar~…ĺaj nu aadińßan " u mańßaminaj adińßan ku ńß…ôkańß…ôkar~…ĺan", sisa itini i tukaj paŇčaŇčan ńßan u " tukaj sakainar~…ĺan nu aadińßan". ńßatiniaj tu nu tukajan, ina muo-t…ôn matatunduńßaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° itini i tapukuan a k…ônisan idaw ku aŇčaŇčaŇčan nu nida. *** . "t…ôn- ¶i -sin" ina sasakamu…ôn sajawaj a nika tańß…ôkar~…ĺa i ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut war~…ĺu a r~…ĺasubu siwa a bataan idaw ku …ôn…ôm (****) mińß ¶aan, tajan i niu-j…ô pasiŇčbuŇčaj idaw ku baŇč ¶ar~…ĺaj nu kur~…ĺitan a sapasiŇčdŇč a sur~…ĺitan. misaŇčaaj tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° ¶i paw-r~…ĺuo.d. s…ô-pu-k…ôn "paur~…ĺ d. spr…ôir…ôg" sakamusa tu t…ôn- ¶i-sin i tukaj saan " saka udip nu i tukajaj a u-r~…ĺi kasasiduma, u nar~…ĺimaan kujda sa, sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu aadińßan nu ńß…ôni sa". "***" d*****(paur~…ĺ d. spr…ôir…ôg…ôn) ". ajda jadańß tu ku i kitakidaj nu matin…ôŇčaj tu t…ôn- ¶i-sin a masakaputaj atu wan- ¶…ôn, u sakaj tukaj a muo-t…ôn matatunduńßaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° a tar~…ĺakaw ku sakasiwantanan. idaw ku sananaj sipakajda i baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ atu tar~…ĺakaw nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an atu kaku a t…ôn- ¶i-sin nu ańß…ôbar~…ĺ ku sakasiwantan. sasaausian nina t…ôn- ¶i-sin mańßida u nipiwada tu saadidiaj a ** mi atu *** ¶…ô sa, masaŇčaaj nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an a pur~…ĺuŇč nu tar~…ĺakaw atu " u mi ku sausian, ¶aaj piar~…ĺa tu madi ¶…ômaj". anu masa ¶a ¶ajaj nu ta u pankiw ku sausi tu tar~…ĺakaw nu ńß…ôni sa. . kasasiduma** muo-t…ôn matatuŇčduńßaj a r~…ĺumaan ńßinisa u tukaj nu madajumaj a kasasiduma. saan u saŇčan nu kaku atu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu ¶ab…ôŇč " ¶…ôŇčan atu gar~…ĺasu" mamin ku ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu t…ôn- ¶i-sin a mar~…ĺar~…ĺid, nu ¶aajaj ka r~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu zitaj a nisaŇčaan tu matatunduńßaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an, masa mi ¶id…ôkaj tu a t…ôn- ¶i-sin. nika ńßidaan, itida i inainakaan idaw ku sakaadińß a t…ôn- ¶i-sin, ami ¶a ku ńßida sananaj namaka adidiaj nu tad…ômawan atu jadańßaj nu tad…ômawan a nisaŇčaan. sumamad** itida i ji-ta-r~…ĺi tuo-s…ô-ka-na a s…ôn- ¶i-mi-ni-ja-nuo idaw ku pi ¶id…ôkan a matatuŇčduńßaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an saan ku kamu idaw ku " saka ¶aaj ka pawan a t…ôn- ¶i-sin". itida i sabaw s…ôpat a s…ô ¶i maaar~…ĺaw tu sakaj kir~…ĺian, maŇčr~…ĺaj a sikir~…ĺi atu sakasiidaan a bina ¶adan sapas…ôn…ôŇč a kir~…ĺian, mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu i tukaj misaŇčan tu tar~…ĺakawaj nu taan, sisa ina s…ôn- ¶i-mi-ni-ja-nuo mir~…ĺa sapaŇčaŇčanaw tu " ¶uŇč-s…ô- ¶i a man-ńßa-tun" a t…ôn- ¶i-sin. . sumamad a j…ô-m…ôn sumamadaj a tukajan si-pa-mu, idaw ku mar~…ĺakuujtaj nu tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut (****) a r~…ĺuitan. maŇčar~…ĺaj midiput tu tukaj atu bina ¶adan a ¶aaj ka sawa ¶u nu p…ôi-in tad…ômaw, ¶i si-pa-mu itida i …ôn…ôm a s…ô ¶i patid…ôŇč tu r~…ĺima katuku tu siwa a matatuŇčduńßaj nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an. amin ¶a ajda nina si-pa-mu u tad…ômaw nu ńß…ôni pitu a mar~…ĺ…ôbut a kitidaan nu tukajan (****), nika nika tar~…ĺakawan nina r~…ĺumaan a idaw, ina tukaj siŇčaŇčan tu " u sumamadaj a matatuŇčduńßaj a r~…ĺumaan" atu r~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺik…ônan a man-ńßa-tun. s…ôn ajda ina ¶i-mi-ni-ja-nuo a ir~…ĺuitan nu nijadu Ē~ °an atu si-pa-mu a mar~…ĺumanaj a ¶ab…ôŇč mar~…ĺa r~…ĺin-ńß…ô-kuo- ¶ia-k…ô-w…ôn masakaputaj a kitikid r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan namaka babar~…ĺakiaj a ŇčaŇčanan. . ajdaaj a zitaj ** ¶…ô- ¶ia-k…ô saan u ajdaaj nu tukaj a t…ôn- ¶i-sin a tapaŇč nu kitidaan. ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut war~…ĺu a r~…ĺasubu war~…ĺu a bataan idaw ku r~…ĺima a mińß ¶aan (****), ¶…ô- ¶ia-k…ô misaŇčan tu ¶a ¶aj a bataan nu matatuŇčduńßaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° ńßukin a matatuŇčduńßaj nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an. inasaŇčan u sajawaj u mukinanaj a saŇčaan. sisa nikudanaj nu misaŇčaaj ńßida satu mituduŇč. ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut war~…ĺu a r~…ĺasubu war~…ĺu a bataan idaw ku siwa a mińß ¶an, ina ńßujtan matatuŇčduńßaj a r~…ĺuma mar~…ĺa kitakidaj u satar~…ĺakawaj nu saŇča a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an. ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut siwa a r~…ĺasubu pitu a bataan idaw ku tur~…ĺu (****) mińß ¶aan, ina ¶…ô- ¶ia-k…ô a t…ôn- ¶i-sin mir~…ĺab utu si-…ô-s…ô matatuŇčduńßaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an " ajdaaj a wi-r~…ĺi-s…ô matatuŇčduńßaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °", nika namakajda i ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut war~…ĺu a r~…ĺasubu siwa a bataan (****) mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺiŇčatu , u niw-j…ô ku miar~…ĺaaj tu ¶…ô- ¶ia-k…ô a nikatar~…ĺakawan tu saŇčaan. mar~…ĺa kitakid nu sajadańßaj nu muo-t…ôn matatuŇčduńßaj a tukajan. . katukuńß i **** mińß ¶aan masaŇčan ku tusaaj a taan, ina si-…ô-s…ô matatuŇčduńßaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an itini i kitakid u satar~…ĺakawaj tu, itini tu i ** s…ô ¶i nu ajawan, ¶…ô- ¶ia-k…ô atu niw-j…ô u ajdaaj nu tukaj nu t…ôn- ¶i-sin mar~…ĺańßataj a mir~…ĺiŇčatuaj. ****** . kir~…ĺur~…ĺsa tu ** s…ô ¶i nu ńß…ôd…ôk u ja- ¶uo kanatar~…ĺ nu nikaudip a nikar~…ĺańßatan. ja- ¶uo aŇčaŇčaŇčan nu tukaj mar~…ĺiŇčatu idaw ku masaŇčaaj nu matatuŇčduńßaj a saŇčaan. saan tu san-ńßaj-s…ô a pu-tun-sin- ¶i itida i ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut siwa a r~…ĺasubu war~…ĺu a bataan (**** ) mińß ¶aan naw u tar~…ĺutar~…ĺudan, nika itida i ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut siwa a r~…ĺasubu siwa a bataan idaw ku tusa (**** ) mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺiŇčatu misatadas, am…ôr~…ĺik satu a mabuwańß, mar~…ĺa ajdaaj a pisiwbajan, mar~…ĺa ajdaaj a t…ôn- ¶i-sin. **** . ¶umud satu ** s…ô ¶i, u ¶uŇč-tun a sisimar~…ĺaj nu kanatar~…ĺ ku sakaj nikudan a kanatar~…ĺ ńßida satu matur~…ĺin idaw ku tabakiaj a tukaj nu t…ôn- ¶i-sin a kijakuan. tu-paj a ńßa-r~…ĺi-fa-ta itida i tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut ¶a ¶aj a bataan (**** ) mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺiŇčatu misaŇčan, mikiajaw tu naajawaj a saŇčan nu muo-t…ôn matatuŇčduńßaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an, sa ina tu-paj mar~…ĺa matur~…ĺinaj nu saŇčan a tar~…ĺakaw nu tukajan. ******, . katukuńß tu tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut ¶a ¶aj a bataan idaw ku tur~…ĺu (****) mińß ¶aan, sin-kan itida i *** kun- ¶…ô a saŇčaan mir~…ĺakuujt tu ** a s…ô ¶i nu dajńßiwan a muo-tin-r~…ĺuo nu t…ôn- ¶i-sin a niw-j…ô, u tu-paj itida i *** mi a saŇčaan nu r~…ĺima Ē~ °an mir~…ĺakuujt tu niw-j…ô, mar~…ĺa kitakidaj u dajńßiw a t…ôn- ¶i-sin nu tukajan. ńßatidaaj a wan ¶…ôn saan tu udip a nika situŇčusaj nu t…ôn- ¶i-sin tu ŇčaŇčanan. pasu …ômporis a ¶udadan tu ni ¶ukajmasan atu duma nu sur~…ĺitan u saŇčan a nipatańß…ôkar~…ĺan, pur~…ĺuŇč ńßan mar~…ĺa t…ôn- ¶i-sin. sakasiŇčaŇčanan nu satar~…ĺakawaj ńßan tur~…ĺu a tukajan u sin-kan, suo-…ô atu s…ô- ¶…ôn. …ômporis . sapi ¶ukajmas ** mańßiniaj a t…ôn- ¶i-sin u dadajiwan nu tukaj a tatajdaan midaŇč nu wajwajan, pasu iga, kamuk nu tir~…ĺibi, pasiŇčbuŇčan atu duma nu m…ôtian a kur~…ĺur~…ĺ atu tatajdaan misasiŇč tu papatańß…ôkar~…ĺan. .
S.FORM: == Ten-ci -sin Ś§©ťöõÁ∑ö == Ten-ci -sin " kaku nu maci, kahaminan maadih ku hekahekalan atu tapukuan a sulit" u namaka tukay a talakaway a matatuntunduhay a luma' atu tapukuan. hakiya nu hida sananay a aadihan nu masangaay, picidekan, namakayda i yadahay nu muo-tin matatunduhay a lumaan a masangaay nu aadihan. Ten-ci -sin malatukayay nu masangaay nu luma'an a tademaw nu kakenihan, u sakay tukayan nu micidekay a aadihan. itini i macimacian, ina Ten-ci-sin mala ahebalay nu aadihan " u mahaminay adihan ku hekahekalan", sisa itini i tukay pangangan han u " tukay sakainalan nu aadihan". hatiniay tu nu tukayan, ina muo-ten matatunduhay a luma' itini i tapukuan a kenisan idaw ku angangangan nu nida. Ś§©ťöõÁ∑ö . "Ten-ci -sin" ina sasakamuen sayaway a nika tahekala i cacay a malebut walu a lasubu siwa a bataan idaw ku enem (1896) mihcaan, tayan i Niu-ye pasingbungay idaw ku bangcalay nu kulitan a sapasingdng a sulitan. misangaay tu luma' ci Paw-luo.D. Se-pu-ken "Paul D. Spreireg" sakamusa tu Ten-ci-sin i tukay saan " saka udip nu i tukayay a u-li kasasiduma, u nalimaan kuyda sa, sakalecad nu aadihan nu heni sa". "Ś§©ťöõÁ∑ö" D¬∑śĖĮśôģťáĆś†Ļ(Paul D. Spreiregen) ". ayda yadah tu ku i kitakiday nu matinengay tu Ten-ci-sin a masakaputay atu wan-cen, u sakay tukay a muo-ten matatunduhay a luma' a talakaw ku sakasiwantanan. idaw ku sananay sipakayda i bangcal atu talakaw nu luma'an atu kaku a Ten-ci-sin nu ahebal ku sakasiwantan. sasaausian nina Ten-ci-sin mahida u nipiwada tu saadidiay a 90 mi atu 295 ce sa, masangaay nu luma'an a pulung nu talakaw atu " u mi ku sausian, caay piala tu madicemay". anu masacacayay nu ta u pankiw ku sausi tu talakaw nu heni sa. . kasasidumaÁČĻŚĺĶ muo-ten matatungduhay a lumaan hinisa u tukay nu madayumay a kasasiduma. saan u sangan nu kaku atu hekal nu cabeng " cengan atu galasu" mamin ku hekal nu Ten-ci-sin a malalid, nu caayay ka lecad nu zitay a nisangaan tu matatunduhay a luma'an, masa micidekay tu a Ten-ci-sin. nika hidaan, itida i inainakaan idaw ku sakaadih a Ten-ci-sin, amica ku hida sananay namaka adidiay nu tademawan atu yadahay nu tademawan a nisangaan. sumamadŚŹ§šĽ£ itida i Yi-ta-li Tuo-se-ka-na a Sen-ci-mi-ni-ya-nuo idaw ku picidekan a matatungduhay a luma'an saan ku kamu idaw ku " saka caay ka pawan a Ten-ci-sin". itida i sabaw sepat a seci maaalaw tu sakay kilian, manglay a sikili atu sakasiidaan a binacadan sapaseneng a kilian, malingatu tu i tukay misangan tu talakaway nu taan, sisa ina Sen-ci-mi-ni-ya-nuo mila sapanganganaw tu " cung-se-ci a Man-ha-tun" a Ten-ci-sin. . sumamad a Ye-men sumamaday a tukayan Si-pa-mu, idaw ku malakuuytay nu tusa a malebut (2000) a luitan. mangalay midiput tu tukay atu binacadan a caay ka sawacu nu Pei-in tademaw, ci Si-pa-mu itida i enem a seci patideng tu lima katuku tu siwa a matatungduhay nu luma'an. aminca ayda nina Si-pa-mu u tademaw nu heni pitu a malebut a kitidaan nu tukayan (7000), nika nika talakawan nina lumaan a idaw, ina tukay singangan tu " u sumamaday a matatungduhay a lumaan" atu likelikenan a Man-ha-tun. Sen ayda ina Ci-mi-ni-ya-nuo a iluitan nu niyadu'an atu Si-pa-mu a malumanay a cabeng mala Lin-he-kuo-cia-ke-wen masakaputay a kitikid lalangawan namaka babalakiay a nganganan. . aydaay a zitay ÁŹĺšĽ£ Ce-cia-ke saan u aydaay nu tukay a Ten-ci-sin a tapang nu kitidaan. cacay a malebut walu a lasubu walu a bataan idaw ku lima a mihcaan (1885), Ce-cia-ke misangan tu cacay a bataan nu matatungduhay a luma' nu luma' hukin a matatungduhay nu luma'an. inasangan u sayaway u mukinanay a sangaan. sisa nikudanay nu misangaay hida satu mitudung. cacay a malebut walu a lasubu walu a bataan idaw ku siwa a mihcan, ina huytan matatungduhay a luma mala kitakiday u satalakaway nu sanga a luma'an. cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu pitu a bataan idaw ku tulu (1973) mihcaan, ina Ce-cia-ke a Ten-ci-sin milab utu Si-e-se matatungduhay a luma'an " aydaay a Wi-li-se matatungduhay a luma'", nika namakayda i cacay a malebut walu a lasubu siwa a bataan (1890) mihcaan malingatu , u Niw-ye ku mialaay tu Ce-cia-ke a nikatalakawan tu sangaan. mala kitakid nu sayadahay nu muo-ten matatungduhay a tukayan. . katukuh i 1997 mihcaan masangan ku tusaay a taan, ina Si-e-se matatungduhay a luma'an itini i kitakid u satalakaway tu, itini tu i 20 seci nu ayawan, Ce-cia-ke atu Niw-ye u aydaay nu tukay nu Ten-ci-sin malahatay a milingatuay. ÁõīŚąį1997 . kilulsa tu 20 seci nu hedek u Ya-cuo kanatal nu nikaudip a nikalahatan. Ya-cuo angangangan nu tukay malingatu idaw ku masangaay nu matatungduhay a sangaan. saan tu San-hay-se a Pu-tun-sin-ci itida i cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu walu a bataan (1980 ) mihcaan naw u talutaludan, nika itida i cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu siwa a bataan idaw ku tusa (1992 ) mihcaan malingatu misatadas, amelik satu a mabuwah, mala aydaay a pisiwbayan, mala aydaay a Ten-ci-sin. ťö®ŤĎó20 . cumud satu 21 seci, u Cung-tun a sisimalay nu kanatal ku sakay nikudan a kanatal hida satu matulin idaw ku tabakiay a tukay nu Ten-ci-sin a kiyakuan. Tu-pay a Ha-li-fa-ta itida i tusa a malebut cacay a bataan (2010 ) mihcaan malingatu misangan, mikiayaw tu naayaway a sangan nu muo-ten matatungduhay a luma'an, sa ina Tu-pay mala matulinay nu sangan a talakaw nu tukayan. ťÄ≤ŚÖ•21šłĖÁīÄ, . katukuh tu tusa a malebut cacay a bataan idaw ku tulu (2013) mihcaan, Sin-kan itida i 150 kun-ce a sangaan milakuuyt tu 20 a seci nu dayhiwan a muo-tin-luo nu Ten-ci-sin a Niw-ye, u Tu-pay itida i 200 mi a sangaan nu lima'an milakuuyt tu Niw-ye, mala kitakiday u dayhiw a Ten-ci-sin nu tukayan. hatidaay a wancen saan tu udip a nika situngusay nu Ten-ci-sin tu nganganan. pasu Emporis a cudadan tu nicukaymasan atu duma nu sulitan u sangan a nipatahekalan, pulung han mala Ten-ci-sin. sakasinganganan nu satalakaway han tulu a tukayan u Sin-kan, Suo-e atu Se-cen. Emporis . sapicukaymas ťĀčÁĒ® mahiniay a Ten-ci-sin u dadayiwan nu tukay a tataydaan midang nu waywayan, pasu iga, kamuk nu tilibi, pasingbungan atu duma nu metian a kulul atu tataydaan misasing tu papatahekalan. .

u dadajiwan nu tukaj a tatajdaan midaŇč nu wajwajan, pasu iga, kamuk nu tir~…ĺibi, pasiŇčbuŇčan atu duma nu m…ôtian a kur~…ĺur~…ĺ atu tatajdaan misasiŇč tu papatańß…ôkar~…ĺan. .
